channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [updated] SpeedShotX-SAAS (fiducia-ai-inc-speedshotx-saas) has changed the description of the plan named speedshotx-saas-steady-plan
item.description:
*before*: The SpeedShotX Steady Plan gives you everything — all features, all access, one simple monthly subscription. Designed for brands, teams, agencies, venues, and creators redefining how fans connect in the new engagement economy. -- Note: The Steady Plan includes full access to the SpeedShotX platform. All creative assets — including 3D models, videos, images, and collaboration content — are provided by the customer. SpeedShotX enables seamless integration, activation, and analytics, but does not include content or data creation services. Join the Engagement Economy The SpeedShotX Steady Plan delivers everything you need to power next-generation fan experiences — steady, smart, and built for what’s next., *after*: The SpeedShotX Scale Plan delivers full access to enterprise-grade capabilities for intelligent, automated customer and fan engagement at global scale. Designed for brands, leagues, teams, agencies, and venues leading the next generation of engagement, it enables advanced AI-driven interactions, rich media experiences, and deep platform intelligence — all within a comprehensive subscription built for high-impact deployments.
Note All creative assets — including 3D models, videos, images, and collaboration content — are provided by the customer. SpeedShotX enables seamless integration, activation, analytics, and intelligent automation, but does not include content or data creation services.
